en_title: Sony to Delete Movies Owned by PlayStation Users, List Includes More Than 550 Digital Titles
cn_title: 《PlayStation》索尼将删除PSN用户超550部数字电影
subtitle: 购买≠拥有
opus_summary: 索尼因许可问题将于9月1日删除PSN上超550部Studio Canal电影，无退款；此前Discovery类似事件曾撤回，但30个月期限已到；引发数字所有权争论。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation has notified users that it will soon delete more than 550 digital movies from users' PSN accounts due to a licensing agreement with Studio Canal.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation已通知用户，由于与Studio Canal的许可协议，即将从用户的PSN账户中删除超过550部数字电影。

paragraphs.en: Sony began sending out its warning message via email earlier this week. X/Twitter user @somatyk was one of the first to share the notification, which says the move affects "any" Studio Canal content they may have purchased (via Kotaku ).
paragraphs.cn: 本周早些时候，索尼已通过邮件开始发送警告通知。X用户@somatyk最先分享了这一通知，称此举会影响他们可能已购买的任何Studio Canal内容（来源Kotaku）。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation lays it out clearly: "The content will be removed from your video library." The movies will be deleted September 1, 2026. You can see the 551 digital titles affected in a list posted on PlayStation's website .
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation明确表示：「相关内容将从你的视频库中移除。」这些电影将于2026年9月1日删除。你可以在PlayStation网站上公布的列表中查看受影响的551部数字影片。

paragraphs.en: $7.535B 2025 profit, but Sony are quite happy to shaft their customers, given half the chance. pic.twitter.com/2QVpSJ7e9D
paragraphs.cn: 「2025年利润75.35亿美元(约合人民币513亿元)，但索尼逮着机会就会坑自己客户。」（附图片）

paragraphs.en: "From September 1, 2026, due to our content licensing agreements, you will no longer be able to access your previously purchased content from Studio Canal, and it will be removed from your video library," Sony's message says bluntly. "Thank you, PlayStation Store."
paragraphs.cn: 索尼的信息直截了当：「自2026年9月1日起，由于我们的内容许可协议，您将无法再访问此前从Studio Canal购买的内容，它也将从您的视频库中移除。感谢您使用PlayStation Store。」

paragraphs.en: If you have ever purchased digital movies through the PlayStation Store, you might want to go check out that list. There are plenty of lesser-known films that may not affect many PSN users, but there is a healthy number of popular titles, too.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你曾通过PlayStation Store购买过数字电影，或许该去查查那份名单。名单上有大量不太知名的影片，可能对多数PSN用户影响不大，但同样有不少热门作品。

paragraphs.en: Some digital versions of movies you may recognize include Apocalypse Now: The Final Cut, Attack the Block, Evil Dead, Highlander, Hot Fuzz, Paddington, Rambo: First Blood, RoboCop (2014), Sharknado, Terminator 2: Judgment Day, and The Beatles: Eight Days a Week – The Touring Years. There are some TV shows on the list, too, including American Gods Season 1 and Below the Surface Season 1.
paragraphs.cn: 一些你可能熟悉的数字版电影包括《现代启示录：最终剪辑》《街区大作战》《鬼玩人》《高地人》《热血警探》《帕丁顿熊》《兰博：第一滴血》《机械战警》（2014）《鲨卷风》《终结者2：审判日》和《披头士：一周八天 – 巡演岁月》。列表中还有一些电视剧，包括《美国众神》第一季和《水面之下》第一季。

paragraphs.en: For now, there is no sign of refunds or alternatives for those who purchased any of the movies on the list. IGN has reached out to Sony for comment.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，对于购买过列表中任何电影的用户，没有任何退款或替代方案的迹象。IGN已联系索尼寻求置评。

paragraphs.en: This isn't the first time Sony has made an announcement regarding the sudden removal of digital movies and shows from the PlayStation Store. In December 2023, the company revealed that Discovery content would be pulled from purchasers' accounts with a message almost identical to the one shared today.
paragraphs.cn: 这并非索尼首次就PlayStation Store突然下架数字电影和剧集发出公告。2023年12月，该公司曾透露Discovery内容将从购买者账户中移除，当时的信息与今天的内容几乎如出一辙。

paragraphs.en: It resulted in quite a negative reaction from those who expected to maintain ownership of titles they had purchased. Just weeks later, Sony reversed course , saying that Discovery titles would no longer be deleted. It said the change of plans was the result of "updated licensing arrangements," thanking fans for their "ongoing support and feedback." At the time, that secured the ability for users to access their purchased Discovery titles "for at least the next 30 months." That 30-month timeline came to an end this month, June 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 这引发了那些期望保留已购内容所有权的用户的强烈反对。仅仅几周后，索尼改变决定，称Discovery内容将不再删除。公司表示，计划的变更是由于「更新的许可安排」，并感谢粉丝们的「持续支持与反馈」。当时，这确保了用户能够访问其购买的Discovery内容「至少再持续30个月」。而这30个月的期限已于本月，2026年6月到期。

paragraphs.en: Sony announced it would "no longer offer movie and TV purchases and rentals on the PlayStation Store" back in 2021. As it moves to delete movies from PlayStation accounts with only a few months' heads-up, fans online are once again discussing what it means to "own" a digital product. It's a topic Time Extension explored in a guest column in 2024. As the fight for digital, movie, TV, and game ownership continues, you can read about why many Grand Theft Auto 6 players are upset with Rockstar Games' latest .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼早在2021年就宣布，将「不再在PlayStation Store上提供电影和电视节目的购买与租赁服务」。随着它仅提前几个月通知就从PlayStation账户中删除电影，在线粉丝再次开始讨论「拥有」数字产品到底意味着什么。2024年，Time Extension在一篇客座专栏中探讨了这个话题。随着数字电影、电视和游戏所有权之争持续，你可以了解一下为什么许多《侠盗猎车手6》玩家对Rockstar的最新举措感到不满。

translated_terms.The Beatles: Eight Days a Week – The Tou: 《披头士：一周八天 – 巡演岁月》
